title: Business 360 Search API Request
description: Request body for POST /search/public/api/v1/search. Use either 'search' or 'fields', not both.

entityType.description: Internal ID of the business entity to search (e.g. c360.person, c360.organization). Connector requires a specific entity; select from the Business Entity Id dropdown.

search.description: Search string. Use * to retrieve all records (often with filters). Supports fuzzy search, wildcards (*, ~, &&, ||). For exact search, enclose in double quotes.

fields.description: Search specific basic, smart, system, or dynamic fields (e.g. first name "J*"). Use search or fields, not both.

maxRecords.description: Maximum number of records to return. Search cannot return more than 10,000 records per page.

pageSize.description: Number of search results per page.

recordsToReturn.description: Number of search results to return.

filterOperator.description: Logical operator to combine filter conditions.

filters.description: List of filter conditions. Combined according to filterOperator.

fieldName.description: Name of the field to filter on.

fieldValue.description: Value(s) for the comparison. Omit for IS_MISSING/IS_NOT_MISSING. Use array for IN; use two-element array for BETWEEN.

fieldName.description: Name of the field to sort by.
